summer.name: Summer
summer.subtitle: Delicate, cool and muted

steps.title: Upload a photo
steps.description: Take a selfie in natural light, no filters. The AI needs to see the real colors of your skin, hair and eyes.

steps.title: AI analyzes your colors
steps.description: In about 90 seconds, our advanced vision technology examines undertone, value, intensity and contrast to classify you in one of the 12 color sub-seasons.

steps.title: Receive your dossier
steps.description: A professional visual dossier with a personalized palette, outfit pairings for every occasion, makeup advice and a guide to your ideal metals.

seasons.title: Which season are you?
seasons.lead: Every person has a unique natural palette. Discover your color season and transform the way you choose colors.

feature1.title: Your face, your colors
feature1.description: The AI doesn't just slot you into a category. It analyzes undertone, value, contrast and intensity of your skin in depth to pinpoint the exact sub-season among the 12 available.
bullets: Analysis of skin, hair and eyes

feature2.title: Outfits in harmony
feature2.description: Not just a list of colors: you get concrete combinations for every occasion. From business looks to weekend wear, every suggestion is built for your personal palette.

finalCta.title: Your color dossier is waiting
finalCta.lead: One photo. Two minutes. A professional dossier that will change the way you choose colors, forever.
finalCta.subnote: No subscription · One-time payment · Money-back guarantee

privacy.metaDescription: Armocromia privacy notice: photo and personal data processing, legal basis, 24h retention, GDPR rights.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
intro: This notice describes how Armocromia (hereinafter also "we" or "the Service") processes personal data of users who access the site armocromia-mvp-nine.vercel.app and use the AI color analysis service.

Processing is carried out in compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), Italian Legislative Decree 196/2003 as amended by Decree 101/2018 and — for users residing outside the European Union — applicable regulations (CCPA for California, UK GDPR, LGPD in Brazil, PIPEDA in Canada).

sec1.heading: 1. Data controller
sec1.p2: For any request regarding the processing of your personal data, write to us at privacy@antigravity.dev.

sec2.heading: 2. Categories of data collected
sec2.intro: We process the following categories of personal data:
items: Email address: needed to authenticate you via OTP code and to send service communications (purchase receipt, dossier-ready notifications).

Photo of your face: the image you upload for color analysis constitutes a biometric datum under Art. 9 GDPR (special category). It is processed by the AI to extract information about skin tone, hair and eyes, and is automatically deleted within 24 hours of upload.
Analysis result (dossier): the color classification, palette and generated guidance. These are retained so that you can consult and download your dossier as long as your account remains active.
Payment data: handled directly by Stripe (see § 6). We do not store card numbers or banking credentials — we only receive the transaction ID and the outcome.
Technical data: IP address, user agent, request timestamps, session cookies needed for login to work. We do not use profiling or third-party advertising cookies.

sec3.heading: 3. Purposes and legal basis

rows.basis: Performance of a contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) + explicit consent for biometric data (Art. 9.2.a GDPR)

sec3.after: Consent for processing your photo as biometric data is collected at upload time, before submission to the AI. You can withdraw consent at any time by deleting your account or requesting removal via email.

sec4.heading: 4. Retention period
items: Original photo: automatically deleted within 24 hours of upload via a scheduled job. No backup copy is kept beyond this period.
Generated dossier and palette: retained as long as your account remains active. You can delete them individually from the dashboard at any time.
Account and email: deleted upon your request or after 24 months of inactivity (with email notice 30 days in advance).
Tax data: retained for 10 years as required by Italian law (Art. 2220 Civil Code).
Security logs: retained for 90 days and then deleted.

sec5.heading: 5. Processing methods and security
sec5.p1: Data is processed using IT tools and stored on protected servers, with technical and organizational measures designed to ensure confidentiality, integrity and availability (TLS 1.2+ encryption in transit, at-rest encryption of file storage, passwordless authentication with time-limited OTP codes, Row-Level Security at the database layer, HTTP security headers). No manual processing or automated decision-making producing significant legal effects on the user takes place (the color analysis is purely informational in nature).

sec6.heading: 6. Data recipients (sub-processors)
sec6.intro: To deliver the service we rely on the following providers (sub-processors under Art. 28 GDPR):
sec6.after: Transfers outside the EU take place on the basis of the Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) approved by the European Commission with Decision 2021/914. fal.ai and Vercel have signed Data Processing Agreements that prohibit using the data to train AI models.

sec7.heading: 7. Your rights
sec7.intro: As a data subject, you have the right to:
items: Access (Art. 15 GDPR): obtain a copy of your data.
Rectification (Art. 16): correct inaccurate data.
Erasure / right to be forgotten (Art. 17): delete your account and all associated data.
Restriction (Art. 18): request the suspension of processing.
Portability (Art. 20): receive your data in a structured format (JSON).
Objection (Art. 21): object to processing based on legitimate interest.
Withdrawal of consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
Complaint to the Italian Data Protection Authority (garanteprivacy.it) or the authority in your country of residence.
sec7.after: To exercise your rights, write to us at privacy@antigravity.dev. We will respond within 30 days.

sec8.heading: 8. California residents (CCPA / CPRA)
sec8.p1: If you reside in California, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act: to know the categories of personal information collected, to request their deletion, and to opt out of sale or sharing (to be clear: we do not sell or share your personal data).

sec9.heading: 9. Minors
sec9.p1: The Service is intended for users aged 16 or older. We do not knowingly collect data from minors; if we become aware of an account belonging to a minor, we delete it immediately.

sec10.heading: 10. Changes to this notice
sec10.p1: We may update this notice in case of technical, regulatory or organizational changes. Substantial changes will be communicated by email at least 30 days in advance. The last-updated date is shown at the top.

callout.lead: Questions? Write to us at privacy@antigravity.dev. We'll respond within 5 working days.

terms.metaDescription: Armocromia terms and conditions: scope of service, €29 price, 14-day refund right, limitation of liability.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (hereinafter the "Terms") govern access to and use of the Armocromia service (hereinafter the "Service") provided by Antigravity. By using the Service you fully accept these Terms. If you do not accept them, do not use the Service.

sec1.heading: 1. Provider
sec1.p1: The Service is provided by Antigravity, reachable at the email address info@antigravity.dev. For support and refund requests: {refundEmail}.

sec2.heading: 2. Scope of the Service
sec2.p1: Armocromia is a digital personalized color analysis service. The user uploads a photo of themselves and receives a visual dossier generated by artificial intelligence that includes: classification into one of the 12 color sub-seasons, a recommended color palette, outfit suggestions and practical advice.
sec2.p2: The dossier is informational and entertainment in nature and does not constitute professional image, styling, fashion or medical advice. Artificial intelligence can make mistakes: results should be evaluated with a critical mind.

sec3.heading: 3. Eligibility and capacity to contract
sec3.p1: To use the Service you must be at least 16 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into binding contracts in your country of residence. You are required to provide a valid email address and to keep your access credentials confidential.

sec4.heading: 4. Account and credential responsibility
sec4.p1: Access is via email address and a one-time OTP code sent by email (passwordless authentication). You are responsible for the security of your inbox and for any activity carried out by your account. In case of suspected unauthorized access, contact us immediately.

sec5.heading: 5. Price, VAT and payment
items: The price of the Service is {price}, one-time, per generated dossier. No subscription, no recurring charges.

The price includes VAT where applicable. For users residing in the European Union, VAT is applied at the rate of the country of residence via the OSS (One-Stop-Shop) scheme. For USA users, where required, sales tax of the state of residence applies.
Payment is handled by Stripe Payments Europe Ltd via secure checkout. We accept the main credit/debit cards. We do not store card numbers on our servers.
The purchase receipt is sent by email and can be downloaded from your account at any time.

sec6.heading: 6. Right of withdrawal — Refund within {refundDays} days
sec6.highlight: You are entitled to a full refund within {refundDays} days of the purchase date, with no need to provide any reason.
sec6.p1: To exercise the right of withdrawal it is sufficient to write to {refundEmail} indicating the email address associated with the purchase. The refund will be credited to the original payment method within 5 working days of receiving the request.
sec6.p2: Pursuant to Art. 59 of the Italian Consumer Code (Legislative Decree 206/2005) and Directive EU 2011/83, the provider of a digital service may exclude the right of withdrawal once the service has been performed. We waive that exception: a refund within {refundDays} days is guaranteed even if you have already viewed and downloaded the dossier.

sec7.heading: 7. Intellectual property
items: The generated dossier is yours for personal use. You can download it, print it, share it with friends and fashion professionals.
You may not resell, sub-license or use the dossier for commercial purposes (e.g. paid advice to third parties) without our written consent.
The software, site design, AI prompts, infographic artwork and output templates remain our exclusive property.

You retain full ownership of the photo you upload. You grant Antigravity a limited, free, temporary license (maximum 24 hours) for the sole purpose of processing it with the AI and generating the dossier. We do not use your photo to train AI models nor do we sell it to third parties.

sec8.heading: 8. User conduct
items: uploading photos of third parties without their explicit consent (this may constitute a breach of privacy and biometric regulations);
uploading illegal, obscene, violent, discriminatory content or content that infringes third-party rights;
attempting to breach the security of the Service, accessing other users' data, reverse engineering or automated scraping;
using the Service for unlawful or fraudulent purposes, including abusive chargebacks after receiving and using the dossier.
sec8.after: We reserve the right to suspend or close accounts that violate these Terms, without prejudice to the right of refund for the Service not yet delivered.

sec9.heading: 9. Limitation of liability
items: The Service is provided "as is" ("as-is"). While we strive to ensure quality and continuity, we do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted or error-free.
The color analysis generated by AI is subjective and probabilistic. We do not warrant that the classification will match analyses performed by professional image consultants.
Our total liability towards you, for any reason, is limited to the amount you have actually paid for the Service in the last 12 months.
To the extent permitted by law, we exclude liability for indirect damages, loss of profit, loss of data or business interruption arising from use of the Service.
Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability provided by mandatory consumer-protection law (e.g. personal injury, willful misconduct or gross negligence).

sec10.heading: 10. Force majeure
sec10.p1: We shall not be liable for delays or non-performance of the Service caused by events beyond our reasonable control, including but not limited to: cloud provider downtime (Vercel, Supabase), suspension of third-party AI APIs (fal.ai, Google Gemini), cyber attacks, natural disasters, governmental acts.

sec11.heading: 11. Changes to the Terms
sec11.p1: We may update these Terms for technical, regulatory or organizational reasons. Substantial changes will be communicated by email at least 30 days in advance. Continued use of the Service after the changes take effect constitutes acceptance. If you do not accept the new conditions, you can cancel your account at any time.

sec12.heading: 12. Governing law and jurisdiction
sec12.p1: These Terms are governed by Italian law.
sec12.p2: For disputes with consumers residing in the European Union, the mandatory consumer-protection rules of the country of residence apply where more favorable. The competent forum is that of the consumer.
sec12.p3: For disputes with non-consumer users (e.g. business purchases), the exclusive forum is Rome, Italy.
sec12.p4: The European Commission provides an online dispute resolution (ODR) platform: ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

sec13.heading: 13. Final provisions
sec13.p1: If a clause of these Terms is declared null or ineffective, the remaining clauses will remain fully valid and effective. One party's tolerance of a breach by the other does not constitute a waiver of the rights provided by these Terms.

callout.lead: Need help or a refund? Write to us at {refundEmail}. Reply within 24 working hours.
